channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: You can grab a refurbished 2021 Kindle Paperwhite starting at just $49.99
item.description: We spend a lot of time at The Verge waxing poetic about the latest gadgets, but sometimes it’s the last-gen devices from several years ago that offer the better value. The 2021 Kindle Paperwhite is a great case in point — especially since you can grab it at Woot in refurbished condition with lockscreen ads, […]

item.title: Somehow Paramount’s ‘Avatar’ Movie Has Leaked, Too
item.description: Twitter's penchant for leaks now includes Paramount's 'Avatar: Aang, The Last Airbender,' which isn't out until October.

item.title: Slate Auto: Everything you need to know about the Bezos-backed EV startup
item.description: Slate auto burst onto the scene in April 2025. Here is a timeline that covers its origins, backers, product, and other new details.

item.title: DJI Romo P vs Roborock Saros 10R — which robot vacuum comes out on top when it comes to dodging obstacles? I put them to the test
item.description: Which robot vacuum offers the best obstacle avoidance and navigation? I put them to the test.

item.title: I spent 6 hours with Genshin Impact on the Galaxy S26 Ultra, and I can't believe how far mobile gaming has come
item.description: To test the gaming mettle of Samsung's Galaxy S26 Ultra, I spent six hours playing Genshin Impact on the highest settings.

item.title: J’ai essayé la XPeng P7+ : la voiture électrique chinoise qui se recharge deux fois plus rapidement qu’une Tesla Model 3
item.description: Dans un marché saturé par l'uniformité des SUV, la Xpeng P7+ joue la carte de la résistance. Cette voiture électrique ambitieuse compte bien enterrer définitivement la Tesla Model S avec un prix divisé par deux et une recharge deux fois plus rapide. Pari réussi pour cette nouvelle berline 100 % électrique ? Voici notre verdict.

item.title: The Hisense UR9 is a great first shot against OLED’s bow
item.description: RGB LED TVs have been the talk of the TV world this year, with models coming from all the manufacturers, and the first one of 2026 is here - the Hisense UR9. It's the first look at the viability of the new backlight technology outside of demo rooms, and it's a step above the traditional […]

item.title: How AT&T created the most iconic phone ever
item.description: For years, even decades, virtually everyone in the United States had the same phone. Nobody really thought about it, it didn't even matter what it was called - it was just The Phone. Well, The Phone was called the Western Electric 500, and when landline phones ruled the world, the Western Electric 500 ruled the […]

item.title: À moins de 100 €, ce robot aspirateur-laveur Xiaomi offre un rapport qualité/prix imbattable
item.description: Le Xiaomi Robot Vacuum T12 aspire, lave et navigue intelligemment dans votre domicile. Et il fait partie des robots les moins chers du secteur. Actuellement, Xiaomi le propose à 99,99 euros au lieu de 169,99 euros.

item.title: The Pentagon is doubling down on laser weapons research
item.description: Despite years of promises, the latest budget shows directed energy systems are still largely confined to development and experimentation. After months of bold promises about its directed energy weapon ambitions, the U.S. military is putting its money where its mouth is.

item.title: The World Is Basically Begging for Another iPod
item.description: And nostalgia is only part of the picture.

item.title: Dark web : les pirates ont adopté un langage secret, et il vient d’être déchiffré
item.description: Un véritable langage secret s'est peu à peu popularisé sur le dark web. Combinant les émojis et l'argent, ce mode de communication, taillé pour échapper aux autorités, a été déchiffré par des chercheurs.

item.title: What is the release date for The Testaments episode 4 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Pearl Girl Daisy is starting to make waves in Gilead. But when does The Testaments episode 4 drop on Hulu and Disney+?

item.title: I reviewed the LG G6 for 3 weeks, and it's a fantastic OLED TV that's the new best option for brighter rooms
item.description: The LG G6 OLED TV continues the excellent lineage of its predecessors and sets a high bar for other flagship models to come in 2026.
